creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Apr 15, 2009 at 11:00:10AM +0000, till wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/131611; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: till <till@php.net>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: RE: ports/131611: Updates to database/couchdb
> Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2009 12:25:21 +0200
> 
>  Hey Wesley,
>  
>  is your erlang-lite still broken? I haven't heard back from you.

Yes, sorry.  I forgot about this one.

>  There's a new 0.9.0 release of CouchDB and I'd (attempt to) do another
>  patch, but you wanted to tell me what I should improve first.
>  
>  This is the new release:
>  http://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.cgi?path=/couchdb/0.9.0/apache-couchdb-0.9.0.tar.gz
>  
>  This is pretty urgent now.
>  
>  Do you think we can get to it this week?

No, we are in a freeze right now.  The update will have to wait until
the freeze is over.  I will, however, make sure to work on it so it is
ready for when the freeze is over.

-- WXS
